title: pholidota pallida var. sessilis
intro: Pholidota pallida var. sessilis, also known as the sessile variety of the pale leaf mistletoe, is a plant species that belongs to the family Loranthaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Pholidota pallida var. sessilis can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
